title: Mixing Nutrient Solution from Concentrate
summary: Step-by-step on diluting Part A and Part B without nutrient lockout.
body_md:
## Equipment
- 20 L mixing bucket
- TDS / EC meter
- pH meter and calibration solution

## Steps
1. Fill bucket with 18 L of room-temp water.
2. Add **Part A** first — stir 30 seconds.
3. Add **Part B** — never together with A in concentrate form.
4. Adjust pH to target with phosphoric acid or potassium hydroxide.
5. Verify EC matches crop stage chart.

## Tips
- Always calibrate meters weekly.
- Use cool water — heat speeds nutrient breakdown.

title: Choosing the Right Hydroponic Setup for Your Crop
summary: DFT, NFT, Kratky, Dutch Bucket, SNAP — pick by crop weight and water tolerance.
body_md:
## Quick Match
| Crop class | Best setup | Why |
|---|---|---|
| Lightweight leafy | DFT, NFT, Kratky | Constant flow, no fruiting load |
| Herbs | DFT, Kratky | Low EC, easy maintenance |
| Heavy fruiting | Dutch Bucket | Supports root mass + trellising |
| Beginner farm | SNAP | Passive, no electricity |

## Notes
- DFT is the safest entry point — pumps fail gracefully.
- NFT requires steady power; backup pump recommended.
- Dutch Bucket needs more space and structural support.

title: Daily Operations Checklist for Staff
summary: Morning and afternoon routine to keep batches healthy.
body_md:
## Morning (06:00 - 07:00)
- Inspect pumps and aerators.
- Check pH and EC of each reservoir.
- Note any wilting, discoloration, or pest signs.
- Top up reservoirs to mark line.

## Mid-day (12:00)
- Verify shade-cloth deployed if outdoor.
- Spot-check water temperature.

## Afternoon (16:00 - 17:00)
- Harvest mature batches.
- Pack and pre-cool produce.
- Log all observations in HydroGuide app.

## End of week
- Drain and refresh nutrient solution.
- Sanitize empty channels with 1% H2O2.

title: Pricing Your Hydroponic Produce in Manila
summary: Market segments, price benchmarks, and margin tips for owners.
body_md:
## Channels
- **Direct to consumer (DTC):** highest margin, requires logistics.
- **Restaurants:** stable volume, weekly invoicing.
- **Wet markets:** fastest cash but lowest margin.
- **Online (Lazada / Shopee):** good for premium herbs.

## Benchmark price ranges
- Romaine lettuce: PHP 200-350/kg DTC
- Basil: PHP 400-900/kg restaurant
- Cherry tomato: PHP 150-320/kg DTC

## Margin tips
- Bundle slow movers with hero crops.
- Offer 10% subscription discount to lock revenue.
- Track CoGS in HydroGuide Sales tab to know your floor.

title: Hygiene and Biosecurity Basics
summary: Prevent disease entry and cross-contamination between batches.
body_md:
## Entry protocol
- Footbath with 1% bleach at greenhouse entrance.
- Hand sanitizer before handling plants.

## Tools
- Sterilize scissors with 70% alcohol between batches.
- Color-code tools per zone (nursery / production / harvest).

## Reservoirs
- Drain and scrub every 14 days.
- Replace airline tubing quarterly.
- Cover reservoirs to block algae and insect oviposition.
